category_sources: source_facts.description says parser generator for Java applications; official JavaCC documentation says it is the most popular parser generator for use with Java applications.
display_name_sources: Official documentation heading is JavaCC; source_facts.name is javacc.
docs_sources: Official JavaCC documentation index links command line, grammar, BNF, API, JJTree, and JJDoc docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/javacc/javacc, so repo was left null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official documentation identify Java parser generation, grammar documentation, JJTree, and JJDoc tools.
